chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-109 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 12.09.2025 Mr. Aamir Ali Bhutto, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press the instant petition and seeking permission for filing afresh. Therefore, the instant petition is hereby dismissed as not pressed, with permission to file afresh if law permits. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
